HomeDestinationsKolakham
West Bengal

Kolakham

Where Kanchenjunga Smiles at You

The mighty Kanchenjunga fills the sky, snow glittering like diamonds against impossible blue.

4.5
(98 reviews)
Kalimpong, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
19°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Kolakham offers one of the closest and most stunning views of Mt. Kanchenjunga, surrounded by rhododendron forests and village life.

History

A remote village that has become a favorite among trekkers and photographers for its close-up views of Kanchenjunga.

Altitude

2,000 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Kalimpong, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Viewpoint

Kanchenjunga View

Close-up views of the world's third highest peak.

Nature

Changey Falls

A beautiful waterfall surrounded by forest.

KuboVista

Rhododendron Grove

Ancient rhododendron trees.

Why visit: Beautiful blooms in spring

Viewpoints

panoramic

Kolakham Viewpoint

Closest view of Kanchenjunga from Bengal.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Mountain View Restaurant

4.2

Local • ₹250-450

Meals with the best mountain views.

Cafes

Sunrise Cafe

4.3

Specialty: Hot Chocolate

Warm drinks with sunrise views.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Village Market

Local handicrafts.

Woolen shawlsOrganic teaWooden crafts

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Changey Falls Trek

Moderate

Trek to the beautiful waterfall.

4 hrs
₹1,200

  • • Sunset views
Lunch, Dinner
Taxi from NJP

₹3,000

Activities

Breakfast
Taxi
N/A
₹1,500

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

Frequently Asked Questions

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
